name: QA 1483
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1483

look for bad syslog entries



Copyright (c) 2024 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py fedora38-container reproduce

PCP QA Test No. 1483

look for bad syslog entries

Copyright (c) 2024 Ken McDonell. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py fedora38-container reproduce
statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1483.out.bad)
17a18,27
> Oct 05 19:25:40 9da9531c1e2f rc[675517]: pmpost: cannot open or create file "/var/log/pcp/NOTICES": Permission denied
> Oct 05 19:25:40 9da9531c1e2f rc[675517]: pmpost: unposted message: [Sat Oct  5 19:25:40 2024] stop pmlogger from /etc/pcp/pmlogger/rc
> Oct 05 19:26:00 9da9531c1e2f rc[677609]: pmpost: cannot open or create file "/var/log/pcp/NOTICES": Permission denied
> Oct 05 19:26:00 9da9531c1e2f rc[677609]: pmpost: unposted message: [Sat Oct  5 19:26:00 2024] stop pmlogger from /etc/pcp/pmlogger/rc

> Oct 05 19:26:20 9da9531c1e2f rc[679582]: pmpost: unposted message: [Sat Oct  5 19:26:20 2024] stop pmlogger from /etc/pcp/pmlogger/rc
> Oct 05 19:26:42 9da9531c1e2f rc[682038]: pmpost: cannot open or create file "/var/log/pcp/NOTICES": Permission denied
> Oct 05 19:26:42 9da9531c1e2f rc[682038]: pmpost: unposted message: [Sat Oct  5 19:26:42 2024] stop pmlogger from /etc/pcp/pmlogger/rc

> Oct 05 19:26:46 9da9531c1e2f rc[683345]: pmpost: unposted message: [Sat Oct  5 19:26:46 2024] stop pmlogger from /etc/pcp/pmlogger/rc
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
